decisions.what: Implemented agricultural color scheme with CSS custom properties
decisions.why: Specification required primary-green, secondary-brown, accent-gold, and neutral colors for agricultural theme

decisions.what: Created comprehensive CSS reset and normalization
decisions.why: Foundation requirement for consistent cross-browser rendering

decisions.what: Established responsive typography using clamp() function
decisions.why: Specification required fluid typography scaling for h1, h2, and body text

decisions.what: Used system font stack for typography
decisions.why: Specification explicitly requested -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto stack

decisions.what: Created reusable button components with primary and secondary variants
decisions.why: Component specification required CTA buttons with hover/active/disabled states

decisions.what: Implemented card components for testimonials and benefits
decisions.why: Specification required card styles with subtle shadows and proper spacing

decisions.what: Built form components with focus/error/success states
decisions.why: Specification required comprehensive form element styling with state management

decisions.what: Created GPU-accelerated animations using transform and opacity
Implemented scroll reveal animations with fade-in and slide-up effects
decisions.why: Animation specification required scroll-triggered reveal animations
Specification explicitly required accessibility support for users preferring reduced motion

decisions.what: Implemented mobile-first responsive design with 768px and 1024px breakpoints
decisions.why: Responsive specification required mobile base (320px+), tablet (768px+), desktop (1024px+) breakpoints

decisions.what: Created hamburger menu navigation for mobile with full navigation for desktop

decisions.why: Specification required touch-friendly button sizes with 44px minimum

decisions.what: Used CSS Grid and Flexbox for responsive layouts
decisions.why: Specification explicitly requested CSS Grid and Flexbox usage
